project.name: Kreya
project.tagline: Tell Kreya what you need. Consider it done.
project.description: AI-powered, WhatsApp-first social media management SaaS platform targeting creators and small businesses
project.core_loop: Users send WhatsApp voice notes or text prompts → Claude AI generates social content → Kreya publishes across Instagram, TikTok, Twitter, Facebook, LinkedIn, and YouTube

instagram.status: Live and tested — real post published successfully

secondary_vcs.note: Also exists but GitHub is primary

tables.name: instagram_accounts
tables.purpose: Store linked Instagram account credentials and metadata

tables.name: instagram_posts
tables.purpose: Store generated and published Instagram posts

tables.name: social_audit_log
tables.purpose: Track all social media publishing actions for compliance and auditing

database.security: Row-level security (RLS) policies configured on all tables

test_records.note: Test user created directly in auth.users — not a real Supabase Auth user yet

instagram_api.status: FULLY WORKING — real post published to Instagram on 2026-04-07
posting_flow: POST /v24.0/{ig_user_id}/media — create media container with image_url and caption

token.storage: Plain text in Supabase encrypted_token field — encryption not yet implemented

root_files.name: kreya-app.html
root_files.purpose: Main post-login app interface and dashboard

root_files.name: kreya-asset-kit.html
root_files.purpose: Asset library and design system components

root_files.name: kreya-instagram-code.zip
root_files.purpose: Instagram Graph API integration code and helpers

completed_infrastructure: Supabase project live with all 4 tables (organizations, instagram_accounts, instagram_posts, social_audit_log)
Row-level security (RLS) policies configured on all tables
Homepage (index.html) deployed and live on GitHub Pages
GitLab repo created and connected to Vercel CI/CD
Instagram account switched to Creator type
Meta developer account created (personal FB account used)
Kreya-IG app created on Meta Developer Portal (App ID: 761297643580425)
Instagram API with Instagram Login configured
Access token generated with all 5 business scopes
Token verified via Meta Token Debugger — valid, ~2 months expiry
Test user, organization, and instagram_account records inserted into Supabase
Real Instagram post published via API — core posting flow CONFIRMED WORKING
QStash credentials saved in Notion (for future token refresh cron)
Resend, Stripe, OpenAI credentials already saved in Notion

current_blockers.details: Node.js installed but not recognized in CMD due to PATH issues
current_blockers.workaround: Use Git Bash instead of CMD
current_blockers.next_steps: Configure PATH or use Git Bash consistently

important_caveats: Auth system currently works in demo mode only (no Supabase keys configured in app)
Post-login app (kreya-app.html) is a placeholder screen, not the full product dashboard
Instagram token stored as plain text in Supabase — AES encryption not yet implemented
Supabase test user created directly via SQL — not a real Supabase Auth user
Token auto-refresh not yet set up — token expires ~2026-06-06, set a reminder
Supabase anon key and service role key saved in Notion
on_the_horizon: Build /api/post Vercel endpoint — wraps Instagram two-step posting flow into one function
Connect posting endpoint to Kreya dashboard UI
Wire Claude AI to generate captions automatically
Build WhatsApp input flow (the core Kreya magic)
Wire real Supabase Auth — replace test user with real authentication
Build out full post-login product dashboard (currently placeholder)
Set up QStash cron for Instagram token auto-refresh (before 2026-06-06)
Implement AES token encryption in Supabase
Domain purchase decision (getkreya.com recommended over kreya.ai)
Fix Node.js PATH issue for local development
next_session_priority: Build /api/post Vercel endpoint to wrap the Instagram posting flow that was manually tested and confirmed working on 2026-04-07

key_principles.transparency: Yato values honest audits of what's real vs. placeholder — this should be default communication style
key_principles.cost_consciousness: Free tiers and lower-cost alternatives preferred (Late over Ayrshare, getkreya.com over kreya.ai)
key_principles.hands_on_guidance: Step-by-step instructions essential, especially for terminal commands and developer tooling

developer_environment.development_style: Iterative hands-on sessions; prefers complete, copy-paste-ready deliverables
developer_environment.context_note: Has done significant setup from mobile — guidance should account for context switching between phone and laptop

github_context.mcp_access: Connected but limited (GitHub file reading not currently available)

token_optimization_strategy.purpose: Avoid hitting session memory limits by using this file as context instead of re-reading repo
token_optimization_strategy.usage: Share this file with Claude in conversations instead of raw files
benefits: Eliminates need to read multiple HTML files each conversation
token_optimization_strategy.when_to_update: When tech stack changes, new blockers emerge, or infrastructure is added

metadata.created_for: Efficient Claude integration and token management
metadata.changelog: v1.1 — Added Instagram API live status, Supabase test records, completed posting flow milestone, updated blockers and next steps
